title: GM Control Event
description: An event fired by a GM (or physical prop / external LARP system) to affect the running scene. Posted to POST /gm/event on the LARP Integration API.

event_id.description: Unique identifier for this event instance

session_id.description: The session to deliver this event to

hook_id.description: The GM hook ID to fire (must exist in the session's ScenePlan.gm_hooks)

fired_by.description: User ID or system identifier that fired this event. E.g. 'gm:user-123', 'prop:nfc-door-01', 'system:timer'

fired_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the event was fired

parameters.description: Optional additional parameters to pass with the hook. Hook-specific.

note.description: Optional GM note for the event log. E.g. 'Players found the keycard'
